items.title: [正面] [b]Я не фанат карточных баттлеров, но сюжет и лор...
items.summary: [b]Я не фанат карточных баттлеров, но сюжет и лор в этой игре просто великолепны, как в каком-нибудь аниме - захватили меня и не отпускают. Если Вам нравится стиль японских детективных, психологических, мистических хорроров, то скорее всего, понравится и эта игра. Только учтите, что играть скорее всего придётся руками, так как автобой тут довольно примитивный, с очень простой логикой. Ну и перевод на русский пока что в альфа-тесте, придирчивым людям может не понравиться.[/b]

items.title: [正面] 我去，怎么那么好玩，我饭也不吃，觉也不睡，每天两眼一睁就是打开这个忘却前夜，真的太好玩了，好玩到父母...
items.summary: 我去，怎么那么好玩，我饭也不吃，觉也不睡，每天两眼一睁就是打开这个忘却前夜，真的太好玩了，好玩到父母不想再管我，亲戚看不起我，但是这能怎么办，我已经深深爱上这个游戏了，别人对我的指点只不过是对我的认可罢了

items.title: [正面] I am torn about this game. It is fun enough to ent...
items.summary:
I am torn about this game. It is fun enough to entertain you, but it's not difficult enough to give you that invested feeling every battle. Most of the time, I'm just doing the battle for the sake of it. But it's a free to play game so I'll just give it a thumbs up. Try it yourself and decide. Plus, I don't really like turn-based games, so the fact that I played this for more than 12 hours is enough for me to give it a thumbs up.

What I like about this game:
1. The mechanics of the game is easy to understand and familiarize.
2. The visual is pretty
3. It is a generous gacha game. I feel like I have more than enough to enjoy the game as it is and any purchases ( I never did) that you make are completely optional.
4. I really like the format of the game. You do minor battles, gain temporary boosts, earn coins, purchase relics for more boosts, heal your characters, and then proceed to the final boss fight. With the right strategy you can easily kill the boss in a few turns haha.

What I don't like about this game:
1. The difficulty progression is too slow. I'm in the middle of Chapter 3 and I'm bored. There is a "recommended" level for every mission, and I can easily do the mission even if I'm 2-3 levels lower that the recommended. I searched on reddit when will the game be finally interesting and there were people who said it will be at the end of chapter 5 or early in chapter 6. Part of me isn't willing to wait that long, but the other part of me wants to experience how difficult chapter 6 is. 😆
2. I really can't get into the story.
3. In every line up, you can only have characters from a maximum of 2 realms. There are 4 realms in total. It would have been so much fun if you can have 1 character per realm for your line up and they fight a really OP final boss.
4. The artificial communication with the awakeners in a chat format is cringe to me.
